name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-69
title: feature.json updated date stale relative to repo state (manual maintenance burden)
description: rabbit-cage/feature.json line 22: '"updated": "2026-05-17"'. The 'updated' timestamp is hand-maintained, so any edit that forgets to bump it leaves stale provenance. The contract feature template (per new-feature.py) doesn't even include 'updated' in the scaffold (line 86-99) — so the field is inconsistently used across features. Either move to git-derived metadata (last-commit-touching-feature.json) or remove the field from feature.json since validators don't enforce monotonic updates.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
